scratch_drawer.before: First boot opened the drawer; later boots restored the persisted open state.
scratch_drawer.after: Always closed on app mount/first paint at 28px; the user can open and close it during the session.
scratch_drawer.persistence_choice: Earlier persisted open state is intentionally ignored at the next app mount. User changes still persist and broadcast for current-session consumers.

agent.method: CSS transform scale on the Agent iframe with top-left origin, a 125% inverse-sized iframe viewport, and an overflow-hidden wrapper.
agent.reason: A 1440x900 visual check showed materially more Agent workspace and controls while keeping first-run text readable; the Agent HTML and individual fonts were not edited.

checks.result: PASS; 166 packages installed. npm audit reported 5 dependency findings (1 low, 3 moderate, 1 high).

PASS; trusted/untrusted bridge assertions and zero console/page errors.
PASS; all nine non-human P0 cases.
PASS; Agent factory scrub, approval preview, approved prompt visibility, and zero unexpected errors.
PASS; sidebar 148px, Nexus panel 212px, scratch false/28px, Agent scale 0.8; visual inspection retained readable first-run controls.
PASS after removing generated node_modules from the worktree.
PASS; no whitespace errors before implementation commit.

limitations: npm audit reported five dependency findings; dependency or security remediation was outside this layout-only task.

The first repository doctor run inspected generated node_modules and failed on dependency symlinks/permissive third-party JSON; node_modules was removed and doctor, unit tests, and verify then passed against repository content.
Runtime evidence is a bounded local Chromium observation, not operator acceptance or broad device certification.
